data.title: Collect Income from This Soaring Big Data Stock
data.description: Palantir (PLTR) sees higher call volume and potential for income generation. Setting up short iron condor expiring in Feb 2025 for slow burn profit.

data.title: Costco's Combo Of Strong Loyalty, Unmatched Value Is Rare In Retail: Analyst
data.description: JP Morgan raised the price target of Costco (COST) to $1,090, citing strong November sales. Analysts believe COST has a unique value proposition and potential for global growth.

data.title: Stock Of The Day: Sell Signal In Riot Platforms?
data.description: Shares of Riot Platforms (RIOT) may be forming a new downtrend. A moving average crossover strategy has just generated a sell signal.

data.title: GameStop Rockets As Roaring Kitty Returns To X: What Does His Tweet Signal Ahead Of Q3 Earnings?
data.description: A new tweet from Roaring Kitty is sending GameStop shares higher Thursday.

data.title: How Much Did Americans Overspend On Weight Loss Medications in 2024? GoodRx Reveals
data.description: GoodRx's latest research shows surging demand for weight loss medications like Wegovy and Zepbound, despite high costs and limited insurance coverage, with consumers overspending $200 million in 2024.
